Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Assignment immediately after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Assignment is followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences that lead to a reviewer assignment phase (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that ultimately result in SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences relative to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment events that occur without any preceding SW-Checklist Completed activity
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' does not occur

Name: Percentage of variants containing SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that proceed to at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that experience delays (e.g., include activities like SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week or later reminders)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences that are part of the most frequent variant pattern
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment instances that are followed by editor reassignment (e.g., Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'Assign a Different Editor' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment events occurring in cases that eventually reach SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in comparison to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that appears more than once in the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of variants where SW-Awaiting AE Assignment directly precedes any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection, SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences in cases that include at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that undergo major revision (i.e., contain SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' occurs

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to Manuscript Export Succeeded across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
